name: Amber Rose Soy Candle
description: Indulge in the warm, romantic scent of our Amber Rose Soy Candle. Hand-poured using 100% pure soy wax and infused with a sophisticated blend of Bulgarian rose, warm amber, and a hint of sandalwood. Burns cleanly for up to 50 hours with a cotton wick. Perfect for creating an intimate, cozy atmosphere.

name: Vanilla Bourbon Luxury Candle
description: A decadent fusion of Madagascar vanilla and smoky bourbon creates an irresistible warmth in this premium scented candle. Made with a coconut-soy wax blend and adorned with a wooden wick that creates a gentle crackling sound. Burns for up to 60 hours. The perfect companion for cool evenings.

name: Forest Mist & Cedarwood
description: Transport yourself to an ancient forest with this grounding blend of cedarwood, pine resin, and cool mist notes. Our vegan-friendly soy candle is housed in a beautiful smoked glass vessel. Each candle is hand-poured in small batches ensuring the highest quality. Burns approximately 45 hours.

name: Jasmine & Tuberose Dream
description: A heady floral symphony of fresh jasmine blossoms and sensual tuberose, balanced with a soft musk base. This luxury scented candle is crafted in a hand-painted ceramic vessel that doubles as a decorative piece after the candle has burned. Burns for 55 hours. A truly transformative sensory experience.

name: Classic Ivory Pillar Trio
description: A set of three elegant ivory pillar candles in staggered heights (4", 6", and 8"). Made from premium paraffin wax with a slow-burn formula that ensures even melting and minimal dripping. Perfect for creating dramatic tablescapes, mantlepiece arrangements, or intimate dinner settings. Unscented.

name: Rustic Beeswax Pillar
description: A stunning natural beeswax pillar candle with its characteristic honey-golden hue and subtle sweet scent. Each candle is hand-rolled from pure beeswax sheets, making each piece slightly unique. Naturally air-purifying as it burns. Available in 6" and 9" heights. Burns for up to 80 hours.

name: Marbled Obsidian Pillar
description: A dramatic statement piece featuring striking black and gold marbling achieved through a meticulous hand-swirling technique. This sculptural pillar candle is as much art as it is functional. Each candle is truly one-of-a-kind. Made with premium paraffin for a clean, long burn of up to 70 hours.

name: Botanical Press Candle Art
description: A breathtaking fusion of candle-making and botanical art. Real pressed flowers and leaves are suspended in clear wax around a central pillar candle, creating a luminous stained-glass effect when lit. Each piece is individually crafted and unique. The botanical sleeve can be kept as a decorative piece after burning.

name: Hand-Painted Moon Phase Canvas Candle
description: A truly unique art piece featuring a hand-painted moon phase cycle on raw canvas wrapped around a cylindrical candle form. Each painting is an original work by our resident artist, signed and dated. The canvas serves as a keepsake after the candle burns. Available in three colorway series.

name: The Solstice Gift Collection
description: Our most beloved gift set, The Solstice Collection brings together four of our signature scents — Amber Rose, Vanilla Bourbon, Forest Mist, and a seasonal exclusive — in a beautifully crafted wooden keepsake box. Each candle is travel-sized (20hr burn) and presented in matching amber glass vessels with gilt lids. The perfect luxury gift.

name: Artist's Studio Gift Box
description: A curated collection for the art and candle lover, featuring our Botanical Press Candle Art, a petite hand-painted votive candle, and a scented taper duo. Presented in a hand-stamped kraft paper box with tissue and ribbon. Includes a handwritten card explaining the story behind each piece.
